data.title: Epic: Claude's Home v2.0 — SkogAI Integration & Home Improvements
data.description:
## Overview

After v1.0 (identity, routing, persistence, deployment gate, multi-agent readiness) completes, this epic covers making Claude's home genuinely useful as a workspace within the SkogAI ecosystem.

## Context

Claude explored the SkogAI ecosystem (332 repos under skogai org, Gas Town `~/gt/` shared workspace, sibling agents dot/amy/goose/aldervall/letta, Dolt database backend, skogfences philosophy). Key insight: Dot (gptme) built manually what Claude gets natively — a foundation for deeper integration work.

## Scope (TBD)

* SkogAI ecosystem integration
* Home workspace improvements
* Cross-agent collaboration tooling
